notes: Three distinct tables: Water Production (4 col), Chemical Usage (4 col), Treatment Efficiency (2 col, ~60% width). Water Production rows 2 and 3 have literal em-dashes for cost_per_m3 and total_cost columns. Grand Total line prefixed with a filled black square symbol (■). Chemical row labels (Chlorine, Alum, Polymer) and treatment metric labels are static text, not tokens.
